_instructions.WHEN_TO_UPDATE: Update this file every Sunday evening before Monday's automated run.
_instructions.HOW_TO_UPDATE: Edit the 'value' field for each indicator below. Commit and push to GitHub.
_instructions.FORMAT: Numbers as plain numbers (e.g. 56.4), text as shown (Rising/Stable/Falling).

SOURCES.pmi_manufacturing: S&P Global India PMI — released 1st business day of month. Check Business Standard / Economic Times.
SOURCES.housing_starts: Anarock or PropEquity quarterly launch data. Enter Rising / Stable / Falling.
SOURCES.earnings_growth: Nifty 50 aggregate PAT growth — check Motilal Oswal / Kotak quarterly earnings summary.
SOURCES.unemployment_rate: CMIE monthly headline — check Economic Times / Mint for published figure.

earnings_growth.source_note: Nifty 50 aggregate PAT growth post quarterly results
